title: Blackberry Crumble
description: A delicious dessert featuring a mixture of juicy blackberries topped with a crunchy crumble topping.

ingredients.name: Savory
ingredients.notes: Replace with oats if not using savory

ingredients.name: Dense
ingredients.notes: Replace with oats if not using dense

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the blackberries and granulated sugar.
Transfer the blackberry mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, combine the flour, light brown sugar, and cold unsalted butter.
Use your fingers or a pastry blender to work the butter into the dry ingredients until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Add the savory and dense to the crumb mixture and stir to combine.
Spread the crumb mixture evenly over the top of the blackberry filling.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
